items.title: Dow Jones Tech Titan Apple Eyes Latest Buy Point Amid Stock Market Volatility
items.description: Dow Jones tech titan Apple stock, along with Hims & Hers Health and Zscaler, are in or near buy zones amid the stock market volatility.

items.title: TSMC Earnings: Here's What To Expect As AI Reaches A Fever Pitch
items.description: Discover why TSMC's strong earnings and AI leadership make it a top stock to watch now. Click for my updated look at TSM stock and my earnings preview.

items.title: Tech Is Valued as if AI Is the Next Smartphone. It Isn’t.
items.description: Investors don’t care if AI stocks are pricey as long as companies deliver hefty profits. But what happens if those profits shrink a lot?

items.title: State of Alabama and Tech Non-Profit Team-up to Boost Economic Opportunity in State's Most Rural Communities
items.description: The State of Alabama, in partnership with the nonprofit Ed Farm, today announced the launch of the Alabama Digital Education Network (ADEN), an ambitious statewide workforce initiative that will establish a network of cutting edge "learning spaces" within the state's most rural communities. Backed by more than $16 million in new state funding, alongside programmatic and technology support from Apple and a connectivity partnership with Alabama Power, ADEN will establish future-focused community l
